svg.title: Synalux POS — offline mode
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for offline mode. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: ⚠ Internet connection lost at 6:41 PM — Operating in offline mode. Your data is safe and being saved locally.
● Offline-ready items — all cached and available for ordering
✓ All data preserved — no action needed · Auto-sync on reconnect

Offline data: IndexedDB (service worker cache) · Stripe offline mode: card data encrypted locally, batch submitted on reconnect · KDS on LAN — uninterrupted WebSocket · pos_offline_queue table synced on reconnect · Menu cache: 24h expiry
SW caches: menu, prices, active orders, employee PINs (hashed). Stripe SDK offline: 200 txn limit, 30-day expiry.
Reconnect flow: pos_offline_queue batch → Supabase → real-time recalc. Card declined on reconnect: manager alert + void flow.
KDS: direct WebSocket on local IP (no cloud needed). Receipt printer: direct USB/LAN — independent of internet. Employee PINs: hashed locally.
Menu schedule: manual override only in offline mode. Loyalty: queued locally, merged on reconnect. Digital gift card balance: read-only offline.
